Owner Setup • Pricing Controls

Discount Rules

Controlled flexibility

Allow discounts without losing profit control

Create reusable discount policies by outlet, item, role, and time window. Keep fraud under control with approval limits, override tracking, and discount misuse alerts.

Manager approval Required

Order-level rules 5

Applied on complete bill totals

Item-level rules 3

Applied to selected menu items

Overrides today 2

Manager reviewed both discount exceptions

Cashier max discount 5%

Anything above requires approval

Rule Library

Active Discount Policies

Lunch Promo Active
Type: 10% off order total Scope: All outlets Time: 12 PM to 3 PM
Takeaway Saver Active
Type: Flat Rs 50 off Scope: Takeaway bills above Rs 500 Outlets: 3 selected
Captain Manual Discount Review
Type: Manual order discount Cashier max: 5% • Manager max: 15% Flagged: Override exceeded once today

New Rule

Approval Policy

Role-wise Discount Limits

Role Manual Discount Order Void Bill Delete Status
Cashier Up to 5% Not allowed Not allowed Protected
Captain Not allowed Not allowed Not allowed Protected
Manager Up to 15% Allowed with note Allowed with reason Sensitive
Owner Unlimited Allowed Allowed Full access

Rule Defaults

Guardrails

Cashier limit 5%
Manager limit 15%
Reason required Yes
Audit log Always on
